Bash(python -c "
import os
base = r'C:\\Users\\Nathan\\Documents\\WordPressTheme\\assets\\videos'
files = ['post-announcement.mp4', 'post-announcement-opt.mp4', 'post-announcement-opt.webm']
for f in files:
    path = os.path.join\(base, f\)
    size = os.path.getsize\(path\)
    print\(f'{f:40s}  {size:>10,} bytes  \({size/1024:.0f} KB\)'\)
orig = os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(base, files[0]\)\)
for f in files[1:]:
    size = os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(base, f\)\)
    print\(f'  {f}: {100 - \(size/orig*100\):.1f}% smaller than original'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import os
base = r'C:\\Users\\Nathan\\Documents\\WordPressTheme\\assets\\videos'
files = ['post-announcement.mp4', 'post-announcement-opt.mp4', 'post-announcement-opt.webm']
orig = os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(base, files[0]\)\)
for f in files:
    size = os.path.getsize\(os.path.join\(base, f\)\)
    pct = f'  \({100 - \(size/orig*100\):.0f}% smaller\)' if f != files[0] else '  \(original\)'
    print\(f'{f:40s}  {size/1024:>7.0f} KB{pct}'\)
")

import os

files = ['post-announcement.mp4', 'post-announcement-opt.mp4', 'post-announcement-opt.webm']
